Privacy Policy.title: Privacy Policy
Privacy Policy.policy statement: Effective Date: May 19, 2025. This Privacy Policy describes how Copark collects, uses, and shares your personal information when you use our parking management services.

line1.details: Copark collects vehicle license plate numbers, parking location data, payment information, account details, device information, and usage statistics to provide our services.

line2.details: Copark uses your information to process parking transactions, enforce parking regulations, improve our services, communicate with you, and maintain the security of our platform.

line3.details: Copark may share information with parking facility operators, payment processors, and law enforcement when required. We do not sell your personal information to third parties.

line4.details: As a California resident, you have rights under the California Consumer Privacy Act (CCPA), including the right to know what personal information we collect, request deletion, and opt out of sales of your information.

line5.details: We implement reasonable security measures to protect your information from unauthorized access.

line6.details: Copark retains your information for as long as necessary to provide our services and comply with legal obligations. Parking records are typically kept for up to 3 years.

line7.details: Copark may update this Privacy Policy periodically. Copark will notify you of any material changes via email or through our application.

line8.details: If you have questions about this Privacy Policy or to exercise your privacy rights, please contact us at coparkspace@gmail.com.
